purpose: Synthetic Termo fixtures for CI — no real client PFX, secrets or live SERPRO calls
notes: Signed XML is generated at test runtime with ephemeral RSA keys (ICP-Brasil not required for unit crypto path).
SERPRO_ACCEPTED is only asserted against HttpAutenticarProcuradorClient with simulated=false.
Wrapping, Base64 envelope, expiry and identity mismatch cases are covered by unit tests.
Live opt-in tests MUST NOT run in CI.
